# Ayush Yadav — Full-Stack Developer
> Portfolio of Ayush Yadav, a Full-Stack Developer from Kolkata, India.

## About
Ayush Yadav is a Full-Stack Developer specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, and React Native.
He is a patent holder (Indian Patent 202531042207 A), hackathon winner, and co-founder of GDG NIT — 
a developer community grown from 0 to 2,500 members in 6 months.

## Projects
- Sentinel: Real-time AI governance proxy with PII detection and prompt injection blocking
- Crop Sense: IoT-enabled predictive farming platform (patented)
- Parse Spy: Automated digital forensics tool using Electron.js and Selenium
